india_trends.title: Milky Mist raises ₹482 crore in pre-IPO round led by Temasek arm
india_trends.summary: The entire primary investment was led by Jongsong Investments, while promoters Sathishkumar T. and Anitha S. sold 89,43,903 equity shares at ₹139.76 a share, aggregating roughly ₹125 crore, as part of a secondary transaction.

india_trends.title: MahaRERA cracks down on errant builders; issues notices over 8,212 projects
india_trends.summary: MahaRERA is taking strict action against over 8,000 housing projects. These developers failed to submit mandatory quarterly progress reports on time. This includes many projects in the Mumbai Metropolitan Region. MahaRERA has issued show-cause notices. Developers have 60 days to comply. Failure coul

india_trends.title: GE Vernova gets order to supply 9 pumped storage units in India
india_trends.summary: GE Vernova will supply nine pumped-storage units for Megha Engineering & Infrastructures Limited's Upper Sileru hydropower plant in Andhra Pradesh. This 1.35-gigawatt project, expected by 2030, will be one of India's largest. Pumped storage is vital for grid stability and balancing renewable ene

india_trends.title: Commodity Radar: As gold holds near Rs 1.5 lakh support, NFP data to decide next breakout. Buy-on-dips strategy emerges
india_trends.summary: Gold prices are consolidating near key support levels around Rs 1.5 lakh after a brief correction, with analysts recommending a buy-on-dips strategy. Market direction hinges on upcoming US Nonfarm Payrolls data, which could influence dollar strength and interest rate expectations, thereby determinin

india_trends.title: Sebi-backed PaRRVA mechanism for performance validation becomes operational. Check details
india_trends.summary: CARE Ratings Limited and National Stock Exchange of India have launched PaRRVA, a framework to verify performance claims in the securities market. Conceptualised by Securities and Exchange Board of India, the platform aims to independently validate risk-return data and standardise disclosures for in

india_trends.title: Carlyle acquires Knack RCM and Equalize RCM to create an AI-native, global multi-specialty healthcare RCM platform
india_trends.summary: Global investment firm Carlyle has acquired a majority stake in US healthcare revenue cycle management providers Knack RCM and EqualizeRCM. This move aims to create a global, AI-native, multi-specialty RCM platform. The combined entity will leverage AI and global delivery to enhance operational scal

india_trends.title: Silver futures plunge Rs 3,917 to Rs 2.47 lakh/kg on weak global trends
india_trends.summary: Silver prices plunged Rs 3,917 to Rs 2.47 lakh per kilogram in futures trade on Monday as elevated crude oil rates amid inflation concerns dampened investors sentiment.

india_trends.title: FPI outflows persist in equities; primary market sees continued interest
india_trends.summary: In 2026, IPO activity is subdued with few listings, while Foreign Portfolio Investors (FPIs) invested ₹12,339 crore in the primary market. Despite significant outflows from equities, FPIs are attracted to primary issues due to appealing valuations and yield prospects.

india_trends.title: BSE SME stock rebounds after announcement of H2 results 2026
india_trends.summary: Harshdeep Hortico Limited's stock rose 9% to ₹100 following positive H2FY26 results, with revenue increasing nearly 15% year-on-year. The company reported improved EBITDA and a 25% rise in net profit, reflecting strong financial performance.

india_trends.title: Gold, silver prices outlook: Where are bullion prices headed this month?
india_trends.summary: Gold, Silver prices outlook: Persistent inflation and expectations of delayed interest rate cuts may cap the upside in gold prices in the near term. However, ongoing geopolitical tensions and steady physical demand are likely to provide underlying support.

india_trends.title: Bank Nifty falls 8% in 2026 so far: Is this correction a buying opportunity?
india_trends.summary: As Bank Nifty faces an 8% decline in 2026, experts debate whether this downturn presents a buying opportunity for investors. While some advise caution, others highlight the attractive entry points for select banking stocks amidst ongoing market volatility and regulatory changes.

india_trends.title: WeWork India opens new coworking centre in Delhi with over 1,400 desks
india_trends.summary: WeWork India has launched a new co-working space in Aerocity, New Delhi. This expansion adds 1.1 lakh sq ft and over 1,400 desks to its operations. The company is growing to meet the increasing demand for flexible workspaces. This marks WeWork India's 17th centre in the Delhi-NCR region. The company

india_trends.title: Aditya Birla Capital Q4 Results: Profit rises 31% YoY to ₹1,129 crore
india_trends.summary: Aditya Birla Capital Q4 Results: Aditya Birla Capital reported a 30.6% increase in Q4 consolidated net profit to ₹1,129.16 crore, with total income rising to ₹13,475.74 crore. The lending portfolio expanded 32%, while the direct-to-consumer platform onboarded 1.1 crore customers by March 2026.

india_trends.title: Global Markets | European shares inch lower as tariff threats drag automakers; investors assess Mideast progress
india_trends.summary: European shares ​ticked lower on Monday as European automakers came under pressure following threats of a U.S. tariff hike, while investors awaited signs of progress in reopening the Strait of Hormuz.
